---
title: ""
---

<h1 style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem;">What We Offer</h1>

::: {.grid}

<!-- Row 1 -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 style="text-align: center;"}
<a href="geospatial-consulting.qmd">
  <img src="images/GeospatialConsulting.png"
       class="rounded-circle"
       style="width: 200px; height: 200px; object-fit: cover;">
</a>

### <a href="geospatial-consulting.qmd" style="text-decoration: none; color: inherit;">
Geospatial Consulting
</a>

We offer tailored strategies for site-specific and regional environmental challenges.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 style="text-align: center;"}
![](images/DataCleaning.png){.rounded-circle style="width: 200px; height: 200px; object-fit: cover;"}

### Data Cleaning & Preprocessing
Spatial data is only as good as its foundation. We ensure your datasets are robust and analysis-ready.
:::

<!-- Row 2 -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 style="text-align: center;"}
![](images/Training.png){.rounded-circle style="width: 200px; height: 200px; object-fit: cover;"}

### Professional Training & Capacity Building
We empower your team to handle complex spatial challenges with confidence.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 style="text-align: center;"}
![](images/AnalyticalSupport.png){.rounded-circle style="width: 200px; height: 200px; object-fit: cover;"}

### Analytical Support
Beyond data preparation, we offer deep-dive analytical services for specialized research.
:::

:::

---

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;">
  <a href="contact.qmd" class="btn btn-primary">Contact Us</a>
</div>
